Thanks to our sponsors

Scientific Exclusif Sponsor

Stand n° B14

The leading event in the dental sector in Algeria

For over 8 years, Dentex has been the premier gathering for key players in Algeria’s dental sector, offering an immersive and enriching experience. As the leading trade show dedicated exclusively to dentistry, Dentex provides a unique platform for professionals to explore the latest innovations, exchange ideas, and build strategic partnerships. Attendees can also enhance their expertise through high-level conferences and hands-on workshops designed to elevate their knowledge and skills.

Download the 2025 catalog

Conference program

Content for team to complete around conference program

Meet Our Expert Dental Speakers

Get ready to be inspired by over 40 renowned dental experts sharing cutting-edge knowledge across a wide range of fields — from Oral Implantology and Dento-Facial Orthopedics to Periodontology, Dental Aesthetics, and the art of the perfect smile. Let their passion fuel yours, and take your practice to the next level.

Conference room program
Speaker corner program
Full conference program

Dr Samir AMAROUCHE

Pr. Abdessalem EL ASKARY

Dr Ouafi Bouafia

What to expect for Dentex 2026 !

Discover innovative products and services

Dentex allows you to discover a multitude of innovative products and services in the same place for 4 days. Consumables or equipment you will find everything there.

Learn and inform yourself about the latest dental practices

Dentex is also a grandiose conference program that encompasses all dental practices, let yourself be inspired by leaders in their respective fields.

Meet all the suppliers in the sector

For 8 years, Dentex has brought together all the suppliers and distributors of the dental sector in Algeria, come and meet them to discuss what you need.

Participate in workshops

Dentex opens the way to learning for you! Workshops are led by exhibitors, schools or experienced trainers, practicing has never been easier.

Discover the biggest suppliers

Exhibitors list

What to expect for Dentex 2025 !

Discover innovative products and services

Dentex allows you to discover a multitude of innovative products and services in the same place for 4 days. Consumables or equipment you will find everything there.

Meet all the suppliers in the sector

For 7 years, Dentex has brought together all the suppliers and distributors of the dental sector in Algeria, come and meet them to discuss what you need.

Learn and inform yourself about the latest dental practices

Dentex is also a grandiose conference program that encompasses all dental practices, let yourself be inspired by leaders in their respective fields.

Participate in workshops

Dentex opens the way to learning for you! Workshops are led by exhibitors, schools or experienced trainers, practicing has never been easier.

Register now
Visitor Registration

Discover our exhibitor's products & services

Don’t miss the opportunity to participate in Dentex, where innovation meets excellence and where the future of dentistry is taking shape.

Exhibitor Products & Services

What our visitors say about us

Hear what our visitors have to say and why they attend Dentex

FREE REGISTRATION
"I came to Dentex with a clear objective: to find consumables and anesthesia products for my practice. And I wasn't disappointed! I was able to compare several offers, speak directly with suppliers, and above all, take advantage of truly attractive prices. The show also allowed me to discover a dental chair model that perfectly meets my needs... I ordered it on site and it will be delivered to me in the coming months. An enriching, practical, and concrete experience. Looking forward to the next edition !"
Meraghnia AhmedDental surgeon
"This was my very first visit to Dentex, and I absolutely loved it! The atmosphere, the organization, the variety of exhibitors... everything was there. For me, who was looking for solutions in the field of prosthetics, it was a most interesting experience. I found exactly what I needed, with the added bonus of enriching discussions with passionate professionals. A first, but certainly not the last !"
Haroune Ali MoussaProsthetist
"I had the pleasure of visiting Dentex two years in a row: last year for lasers, and this year for implants. Each time, I was fully satisfied with the entire show. The organization is impeccable, and the content is always relevant. The workshops I attended were very informative, and the conference program was particularly enriching. Dentex has become an essential event for me to stay up to date in my practice."
Hichem Djilali KobibiDentist

Conference themes

Tuesday 02/06/2026 "Morning"
Modern orthodontics: its contribution to aesthetics
Tuesday 02/06/2026 "Afternoon"
Aesthetics in dentistry
Wednesday 03/06/2026 "Morning"
Prosthetics in the digital age: both removable and fixed prostheses
Wednesday 03/06/2026 "Afternoon"
Periodontal surgery in its various aspects: therapeutic, plastic and implant-related
Thursday 04/06/2026 "Morning"
Oral implantology: from conventional to guided procedures – Planning and management
Thursday 04/06/2026 "Afternoon"
Oral and implant surgery: limitations in general practice
Friday 05/06/2026 "Morning"
Management of various clinical cases in general dentistry
Friday 05/06/2026 "Afternoon"
Open topic

Exhibit at Dentex 2025

Exhibiting at Dentex where you will meet over 7000 dentists and technicians offers an unparalleled opportunity to connect directly with a large targeted audience of dental professionals.

By showcasing your products and services at this event, you gain exposure to a substantial number of potential customers.

The show provides a dynamic networking platform, allowing you to build meaningful relationships with key decision makers and practitioners. Interacting with such a large audience also allows for valuable market research, helping you understand industry trends and preferences.

Overall, attending this show is a strategic move to enhance your brand, generate leads and stay at the forefront of the dental industry.

Book a stand

This event is subject to a strict age limit, anyone under the age of 16 will be refused access to the exhibition
